name: pdesk-binary-roundtrip
description: TauriFsAdapter v2 binary + hash + concurrency, live on the exe via __canaryFsRoundtrip (writes bytes through the BOUND adapter, reads them back). Asserts: (1) non-UTF8 bytes [0xff,0x00,0x80,0x0a] round-trip byte-identical (v1 text-only would corrupt them); (2) the adapter's returned write hash equals the offline known-answer sha-256 of those bytes - cross-checking the Rust sha2 hash FORMAT (lowercase hex) that prebaked lastKnownHash values depend on - plus an optional crypto.subtle cross-check when the runtime exposes it; (3) optimistic concurrency with DIFFERENT bytes per step (P2 review - same-bytes steps were blind to write-then-check reordering and compare-against-incoming bugs): a wrong expectedHash carrying NEW bytes yields a typed conflict AND leaves the ORIGINAL bytes on disk (read-back proves check-before-write); a matched expectedHash writes DIFFERENT bytes and returns THEIR known hash (proves compare-against-disk + write-on-match). Rebinds the global adapter; runs in the trailing rebinding block.

commands: (async () => { const step = (name, e) => { if (!e || e.ok !== true) throw new Error(name + ' failed: ' + JSON.stringify(e)); return e.value; }; const KNOWN_HASH = '2f2e272d087efb57e3a8964f71e382d401c15c42b7a3daf3655a0861ef1754f9'; const KNOWN_B64 = '/wCACg=='; const origAlert = window.alert; const origConfirm = window.confirm; window.alert = () => undefined; window.confirm = () => true; try { const seedPath = step('seed', await window.__canaryDebugWrite('parity-vault-p2-bin', 'seed.md', '# seed\n')); const vaultDir = seedPath.slice(0, seedPath.lastIndexOf('/')); const solutionText = step('exportGraph', await window.__canaryExportGraph()); step('write .qualia.json', await window.__canaryDebugWrite('parity-vault-p2-bin', '.qualia.json', solutionText)); const bind = step('bindVault', await window.__canaryBindVault(vaultDir)); if (!bind.solution) throw new Error('no .qualia.json bound in ' + vaultDir); const adapter = step('fsAdapterInfo', window.__canaryGetFsAdapterInfo()); if (adapter.capabilities.hash !== true) throw new Error('adapter hash cap ' + adapter.capabilities.hash + ' - expected v2 true'); const rt = step('fsRoundtrip', await window.__canaryFsRoundtrip('blob.bin', KNOWN_B64)); if (rt.readBackBase64 !== KNOWN_B64) throw new Error('binary roundtrip corrupted: read ' + rt.readBackBase64 + ' != ' + KNOWN_B64); if (rt.writtenHash !== KNOWN_HASH) throw new Error('Rust sha-256 ' + rt.writtenHash + ' != known-answer ' + KNOWN_HASH + ' (hash format/impl mismatch - would break prebaked lastKnownHash)'); let subtle = null; try { if (globalThis.crypto && crypto.subtle) { const d = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', Uint8Array.from(atob(KNOWN_B64), c => c.charCodeAt(0))); subtle = [...new Uint8Array(d)].map(x => x.toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join(''); } } catch (e) { subtle = 'unavailable'; } if (subtle && subtle !== 'unavailable' && subtle !== KNOWN_HASH) throw new Error('crypto.subtle sha-256 ' + subtle + ' != known ' + KNOWN_HASH); const CONFLICT_B64 = 'AQID'; const MATCHED_B64 = 'qrvMCg=='; const MATCHED_HASH = '844a2275b9926265a260f55eb9ce95a9278b49f374c0fa0e104be43f2ffe5f3e'; const conflict = step('conflict', await window.__canaryFsRoundtrip('blob.bin', CONFLICT_B64, { expectedHash: '00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000deadbeef' })); if (!conflict.conflict) throw new Error('expected a typed conflict result, got ' + JSON.stringify(conflict)); if (conflict.conflict.diskHash !== KNOWN_HASH) throw new Error('conflict diskHash ' + conflict.conflict.diskHash + ' != on-disk ' + KNOWN_HASH); if (conflict.readBackBase64 !== KNOWN_B64) throw new Error('conflict MUTATED the disk: read ' + conflict.readBackBase64 + ' != original ' + KNOWN_B64 + ' - write-then-check ordering bug'); const matched = step('matched', await window.__canaryFsRoundtrip('blob.bin', MATCHED_B64, { expectedHash: KNOWN_HASH })); if (matched.writtenHash !== MATCHED_HASH) throw new Error('matched write hash ' + matched.writtenHash + ' != known-answer of the NEW bytes ' + MATCHED_HASH + ' (expectedHash compared against incoming instead of disk?)'); if (matched.readBackBase64 !== MATCHED_B64) throw new Error('matched write did not land: read ' + matched.readBackBase64); return 'pass: binary bytes roundtrip byte-identical; Rust sha-256 == known-answer' + (subtle && subtle !== 'unavailable' ? ' == crypto.subtle' : ' (crypto.subtle unavailable)') + '; conflict left disk untouched; matched write landed new bytes'; } finally { window.alert = origAlert; window.confirm = origConfirm; } })()
